subject: A large red-skinned horned creature in bone-decorated armor lunging forward with a roar, one fist raised toward the viewer
description: A massive creature with distinctly red skin, multiple large horns, and a wide-open mouth mid-roar fills the foreground. Its body is covered in a patchwork of bone-decorated armor — plates, chains, and what appear to be carved bone pieces assembled into a rough but substantial kit. The creature lunges forward aggressively with one arm extended toward the viewer, fist clenched. A small skull ornament is visible on its gear. In the background, a pale or bone-colored creature (possibly skeletal or lightly-colored animal) is visible in a forested setting. The environment suggests an overgrown ruin or wild territory. The creature's posture and open-mouthed expression convey boastful aggression.
foreground: red-skinned horned creature in bone armor lunging forward
background: overgrown forest, pale creature in background
